    O

    occupants - Variable in class Model.Ship.Components.Cabin
     
    occupied - Variable in class Model.Board.AdventureCards.Components.Planet
     
    OffState - Class in Controller.PreMatchLobby
    Represents the OffState of the game, where no actions can be performed.
    OffState(Controller) - Constructor for class Controller.PreMatchLobby.OffState
    Constructor for the OffState.
    oldCoordinates - Variable in class Controller.Commands.MoveGoodCommand
    The coordinates of the source cargo hold
    oldIndex - Variable in class Controller.Commands.MoveGoodCommand
    The index of the good in the source cargo hold
    onEnter() - Method in class Controller.CombatZone.Level_ONE.CombatZone1EngineDeclarationState
    Called when a player enters this state, checking if there is only one player left in the turn order.
    onEnter() - Method in class Controller.CombatZone.Level_TWO.CombatZone2GoodsRemovalState
    Executes logic upon entering the current game state during the second combat zone phase.
    onEnter() - Method in class Controller.GamePhases.FlightPhase
    Checks if any player has to do an early landing.
    onEnter() - Method in class Controller.GamePhases.RewardsPhase
    This method is called when the Rewards Phase starts.
    onEnter() - Method in class Controller.OpenSpace.OpenSpaceEngineDeclarationState
     
    onEnter() - Method in class Controller.Smugglers.SmugglersGoodsRemovalState
     
    onEnter() - Method in class Controller.State
     
    onHelloButtonClick() - Method in class org.example.ing_sw_project.HelloController
     
    OpenSpace - Class in Model.Board.AdventureCards
    Represents the open space in the game, which is a type of adventure card.
    OpenSpace(int, CardLevel) - Constructor for class Model.Board.AdventureCards.OpenSpace
     
    OpenSpace(JsonObject) - Constructor for class Model.Board.AdventureCards.OpenSpace
     
    OpenSpaceBatteryRemovalState - Class in Controller.OpenSpace
    Represents the state where a player must remove batteries from their ship to confirm the use of double engines during the open space phase.
    OpenSpaceBatteryRemovalState(Context, double, int) - Constructor for class Controller.OpenSpace.OpenSpaceBatteryRemovalState
    Constructs an OpenSpaceBatteryRemovalState with the specified context and declared power.
    OpenSpaceEngineDeclarationState - Class in Controller.OpenSpace
    Represents the state in which a player may declare the use of double engines during the open space phase of the game.
    OpenSpaceEngineDeclarationState(Context) - Constructor for class Controller.OpenSpace.OpenSpaceEngineDeclarationState
    Constructs an OpenSpaceEngineDeclarationState with the specified context.
    orderingCriteria - Variable in class Model.Board.AdventureCards.Components.CombatZoneLine
     
    org.example.ing_sw_project - package org.example.ing_sw_project
     
    orientation - Variable in class Controller.Commands.PlaceComponentCommand
    The orientation of the component
    orientation - Variable in class Model.Ship.Components.SpaceshipComponent
     
    origin - Variable in class Controller.Commands.PlaceComponentCommand
    The origin of the component (hand or reserved)
    otherCannons - Variable in class Model.Ship.DoubleCannonsCounter
     
    out - Variable in class Networking.TCP.TCPNetwork
     
    outQueue - Variable in class Networking.RMI.RMINetwork
